regulation_name: Health Products (Advertisement of Health Products) Regulations
citation: Health Products (Advertisement of Health Products) Regulations — Regulation 6
summary: Quantified efficacy, speed, or results claims for health products require valid substantiation and must not be absolute.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: Percentage improvement, time-bound results, or guaranteed outcomes. ACTION: WARN — require test evidence or qualify with typical results. CHECK: Study citations, sample size, and measurement methodology. ESCALATE IF: 100% efficacy, miracle results, or unsupported statistics.
